stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes the difference between an armed mode and an engaged mode in an autopilot system?

options.a: An armed mode will only become engaged when the flight crew switches to the engaged mode.
options.b: They are the same thing: different manufacturers use different terminology.
options.c: An armed mode will only become engaged when certain criteria are met.
options.d: Only a three-axis autopilot can operate in an engaged mode.
